instructions: Review classification.existing_matches and classification.novel_categories. Edit, add, or remove entries, then re-run with --resume (without --classify-only) to apply.

policy.clause: Providers of general-purpose AI models must not generate or enable outputs that facilitate krádeži, zneužití nebo rozsáhlým důsledkům poruchy; they must ensure adequate cybersecurity of the model and its physical infrastructure to prevent theft, misuse, or large-scale consequences of failure.
policy.source_title: Pokyny k povinnostem pro obecné poskytovatele UI | Utváření digitální budoucnosti Evropy
